metadata.description: Strategic tools for business and product leaders

plugins.name: strategy-kernel
plugins.description: Strategic thought partner using Richard Rumelt's Good Strategy Bad Strategy kernel framework. 8-step interactive workflow for developing rigorous strategy documents.

plugins.name: resume-strategist
plugins.description: Executive resume strategist for CTO roles at Series C/D and IPO-track companies. 7-step interactive interview workflow that extracts business-outcome-driven achievements and produces tailored resumes.
